projects.desc: Featured projects, achievements, and awards received.

top_stats.label: Students and Business Owners trained and consulted

items.title: Timtruongquocte.com
items.short_desc: Built an Organic Lead Engine for the International Education sector, helping to attract potential customers through SEO and school comparison content without relying on ads.
items.desc:
Context

I realized that most parents begin their journey of finding international schools using Google with high-intent queries such as:

Is ESH school good?
Is Asian School good?
How much is the international school tuition?
Comparing international schools in HCMC

Meanwhile, advertising costs are increasing, and Paid Media channels are hard to maintain long-term efficiency.

I asked the question:

How can we turn existing search demand into a high-quality lead generation system with almost zero cost?

Growth Strategy

Instead of continuing to rely on ads, I built TimTruongQuocTe.com as a search and reference platform dedicated to parents.

The strategy focuses on capturing high-intent touchpoints through:

SEO based on actual parent search demands.
School review, comparison, and analysis content.
Specialized Landing Pages for each school and keyword group.
Optimized CTA system throughout the user journey.
Direct integration with CRM to collect, classify, and transfer leads to the admissions team.

Growth Loop
Google Search
↓
School review content
↓
School comparison
↓
Consultation registration
↓
High-quality leads
↓
Admissions
↓
Content & SEO optimization
↓
Organic Traffic growth

Results
Generated a stable source of leads from Organic Search without requiring an ad budget.
Attracted an average of 20–30 high-quality leads per week.
Maintained Cost Per Lead at almost zero.
Reached the exact target audience of parents looking for schools with high conversion potential.
Built a long-term growth asset capable of continuously generating leads over time.

items.title: AI School Matching Engine
items.short_desc: I built an AI-powered school evaluation and recommendation system to personalize the school selection journey, helping parents shorten their decision-making time while increasing lead quality, conversion rates, and remarketing capabilities based on actual behavioral data.
items.desc:
Context

I noticed that most parents struggle when choosing international schools because they have to compare dozens of curriculums, tuition fees, and educational environments.

This prolongs the decision-making process, results in low conversion rates, and requires the admissions team to spend a lot of time consulting unqualified customers.

Growth Strategy

Instead of sending parents directly to a consultation registration form, I designed an AI-powered needs assessment system to help parents identify suitable schools through a series of questions about:

Student age and academic ability
Family educational goals
Tuition budget
Living area
Desired learning environment
Preferred curriculum

Based on the collected data, the AI analyzes and recommends the most suitable list of schools for each family's needs.

Growth Framework
Paid Media / Organic Traffic
↓
AI School Matching Quiz
↓
Collect First-party Data
↓
AI Recommendation
↓
Lead Qualification
↓
Admissions Consultation
↓
Enrollment

Value Created

The system acts not only as a consulting tool for parents but also helps to:

Improve lead quality before transferring to the admissions team.
Increase the conversion rate from ads to consultation registration.
Collect behavioral and demand data from parents.
Build a First-party Data set for Marketing Automation.
Improve Remarketing efficiency based on specific needs.
Increase the accuracy of ad optimization algorithms on Meta and Google.

items.title: Data Reporting System
items.short_desc: Built a Marketing & Growth Intelligence Dashboard on Looker Studio (Data Studio) to consolidate data from Google Ads, Facebook Ads, TikTok Ads, Website Analytics, and CRM into a centralized tracking platform.
items.desc:
Built a Marketing & Growth Intelligence Dashboard on Looker Studio (Data Studio) to consolidate data from Google Ads, Facebook Ads, TikTok Ads, Website Analytics, and CRM into a centralized tracking platform.

The dashboard helps the management board and Marketing team track investment performance in real-time, from budget, CPL, Conversion Rate, CAC to customer quality across each channel.

Through data visualization and reporting system standardization, I helped shorten analysis time, improve decision-making speed, and optimize growth performance based on data rather than intuition.

The system also supports early detection of effective channels, identifies bottlenecks in the conversion funnel, and suggests optimization actions to improve ROI, lead quality, and Marketing budget allocation efficiency.

items.title: CRM Automation Marketing
items.short_desc: Designed and implemented a CRM & Marketing Automation system to automate the entire customer journey, from lead capture, needs classification, scoring, nurturing, to conversion and remarketing.
items.desc:
Context

Parents interact with the brand through various touchpoints such as ads, landing pages, chatbots, events, and the website.

Processing data manually takes up a lot of the admissions team's time and reduces the ability for timely customer care.

Growth Strategy

I built a Customer Journey Automation system on Salesforce CRM and Pardot to connect all customer data into a centralized platform.

The system is designed to:

Collect leads from ads, websites, chatbots, and landing pages.
Automatically sync data into the CRM.
Classify customers by interest level and behavior.
Score customers (Lead Scoring).
Trigger emails and SMS according to each stage of the customer journey.
Automatically route qualified leads to the admissions team.

Growth Framework
Ads / Website / Chatbot
↓
Lead Capture
↓
Salesforce CRM
↓
Lead Scoring
↓
Marketing Automation
↓
Email / SMS / Remarketing
↓
Admissions Team
↓
New Enrollment

items.title: SEO/AIO/AEO/GEO
items.short_desc: Implemented SEO, AIO, AEO, and GEO strategies for completely new websites on Google and AI Search platforms, growing Organic Traffic to over 9,300 monthly visits in a short time.
items.desc:
Context

As user search behavior began to shift under the influence of AI Search and Generative Search, I realized that traditional SEO was no longer sufficient to maintain long-term growth.

Instead of just focusing on keyword rankings, I shifted the strategy to optimizing the brand's overall presence on Google Search, AI Search, and automated answer platforms.

Growth Strategy

I built a content system following this model:

SEO (Search Engine Optimization)
AEO (Answer Engine Optimization)
GEO (Generative Engine Optimization)

The goal is to make the content not only appear on Google but also become a reference source for AI tools and next-generation search platforms.

The strategy includes:

Optimizing content according to Search Intent.
Building Topic Clusters.
Enhancing data structure and semantic understanding capabilities.
Optimizing content for Featured Snippets and AI Overviews.
Building Evergreen content systems capable of generating long-term traffic.

Growth Framework
Search Demand
↓
SEO / AEO / GEO
↓
Organic Traffic
↓
High-Intent Visitors
↓
Lead Generation
↓
CRM
↓
Enrollment

items.title: Google Ads Performance
items.short_desc: Implemented and optimized Performance Marketing campaigns on Google Ads by combining Search Ads, YouTube Ads, Demand Gen, App Campaigns, and Performance Max to drive growth for Lead Generation, E-commerce, and Mobile Apps models, while optimizing CPA, ROAS, and conversion quality across the entire customer journey.
items.desc:
I built and optimized the Performance Marketing system on the Google Ads platform to support growth across multiple business models, including Lead Generation, E-commerce, and Mobile App Growth.

The strategy focuses on leveraging Google's entire advertising ecosystem through Search Ads, YouTube Ads, Demand Gen, App Campaigns, and Performance Max to reach customers at every stage of the buying journey, from awareness and consideration to conversion.

Implementation Strategy

Instead of relying on a single campaign type, I built a Full-Funnel Acquisition model combining multiple ad formats to maximize ROI and scale growth.

Search Ads
Capitalize on existing customer search demand.
Optimize keywords, ad groups, and ad copy to improve Conversion Rate.
Attract high-intent customers ready to purchase or register.

YouTube Ads
Expand brand awareness and create new demand.
Remarket to engaged customer segments.
Increase conversion rates through video sequencing strategies.

Demand Gen
Reach potential customer segments based on behavior and interests.
Expand high-quality audiences outside of Search.
Support demand generation and lead nurturing before conversion.

Performance Max
Leverage Google's Machine Learning to optimize conversions across the entire Google ecosystem.
Automatically distribute budgets to the highest-performing channels.
Optimize CPA, ROAS, and lead quality.

App Campaigns
Acquire new app users.
Optimize App Installs, In-App Actions, and Subscriptions.
Support scalable User Acquisition at reasonable costs.

Value Delivered
Lead growth through an omnichannel Acquisition strategy.
CPA and conversion quality optimization based on actual data.
Revenue growth support for Lead Generation and E-commerce models.
User Acquisition and Subscription Growth acceleration for Mobile Apps.
Leveraging conversion data to continuously improve ad performance and scale campaigns.

items.title: Community-Led Growth Engine
items.short_desc: Built a community ecosystem on Zalo and Facebook around topics that target customers truly care about, thereby generating a sustainable lead source, increasing nurturing capabilities, and reducing reliance on paid advertising.
items.desc:
Instead of just collecting leads, I built specialized communities based on specific needs, such as:

Free IELTS materials sharing
IELTS for Beginners (Gà Mờ IELTS)
Early childhood education
Artificial Intelligence community
Feng Shui stones wholesale market
Other industry-specific communities

Each community operates as an Inbound Marketing channel that helps:

Attract members organically.
Build trust with the brand.
Nurture potential customers in the long term.
Increase conversion rates through valuable content.
Create a First-Party Data source for Marketing Automation and Remarketing.

metrics.label: Leads per month at zero cost

items.title: Facebook Growth & Commerce
items.short_desc: Built and optimized the Facebook Ads system to drive revenue growth, leads, and online orders by combining Social Commerce, Conversion Optimization, and Data-Driven Advertising.
items.desc:
I built and operated the Facebook Performance Marketing system based on the Full-Funnel Growth model to optimize the entire customer journey from reach and conversion to repurchase.

Customer Acquisition

Focused on scaling new customer acquisition by combining multiple targeting methods such as Interest Targeting, Lookalike Audiences, and Broad Audiences, helping Meta AI optimize the search for high-value potential customers.

Conversion Optimization

Implemented various conversion objectives suitable for each business model, including Website Conversion, Lead Generation, Messenger Conversion, and Social Commerce, to maximize the number of leads and orders at optimal costs.

Retention & Revenue Growth

Built Dynamic Remarketing, Customer Retargeting, and Upsell/Cross-sell campaigns to increase Customer Lifetime Value (CLV) and drive revenue from the existing customer base.

Continuous Optimization

Continuously optimized ad performance through Creative Testing Framework, Meta Pixel, Conversion API, and Campaign Budget Optimization, enhancing algorithm learning capabilities and improving ROI over time.

Growth Framework
Audience & Market Research
↓
Creative Strategy & Testing
↓
Facebook Performance Marketing
↓
Lead Generation / Sales Conversion
↓
CRM & Customer Data Platform
↓
Remarketing & Customer Nurturing
↓
Repeat Purchase & Revenue Growth

items.title: Inbound Marketing
items.short_desc: I built YouTube SEO and Content Marketing strategies to grow organic viewership, increase brand awareness, and generate leads through long-term valuable content.
items.desc:
Context

While most businesses focus on paid advertising, I realized that YouTube is one of the platforms capable of generating the most sustainable traffic and leads if optimized correctly.

Instead of continuously running ads, I focused on building Evergreen content systems capable of consistently generating views and reaching customers for years.

Growth Strategy

I implemented a comprehensive Video SEO strategy including:

Keyword and user search intent research.
Optimization of titles, descriptions, hashtags, and content structure.
Building Topic Clusters.
Increasing visibility on YouTube Search and Suggested Videos.
Leveraging long-term content to attract continuous viewership.
Integrating YouTube with Websites, Communities, and CRM to create an omnichannel growth ecosystem.

items.title: AI & Marketing Instructor
items.short_desc: Trained over 500 students and multiple businesses in Digital Marketing, Growth Strategy, AI Prompt Engineering, and AI Agentic Workflow, helping individuals and organizations apply AI in Marketing, Sales, and Operations to enhance productivity and drive growth.
items.desc:
Taught Digital Marketing programs from basic to advanced levels, including SEO, Performance Marketing, Content Marketing, Marketing Analytics, and Strategic Planning.
Trained Growth Marketing focusing on Customer Acquisition, Conversion Optimization, Marketing Automation, and Data-Driven Decision Making.
Designed applied AI training programs for Marketing and businesses, helping teams enhance productivity and optimize operational processes.
Guided students and businesses in applying AI Prompt Engineering for customer research, content creation, data analysis, and workflow automation.
Trained and consulted on building AI Agent Workflows, supporting businesses in implementing automated tasks in Marketing, Sales, and Customer Service.
Mentored real-world projects, helping students and businesses transition from traditional Marketing mindsets to AI-Powered Growth.
Shared methods for applying Generative AI, Automation, and AI Agents to increase organizational efficiency and scalability.

items.title: Ngoc Y Cat Project
items.short_desc: Built Local SEO and Google Business Profile strategies for the Ngoc Y Cat brand, helping the newly established business achieve over 150 million VND in revenue in the first month, and positioning the brand at the top of Google Search and Maps for the key term 'Thuê Áo Dài Gò Vấp' (Ao Dai Rental in Go Vap).
items.desc:
Context

When operations began, Ngoc Y Cat had no brand awareness, customer data, or organic traffic.

Meanwhile, the demand for Ao Dai rentals in the Go Vap area already existed on Google with a stable monthly search volume.

Instead of completely relying on ads, I focused on tapping into the existing demand through Local SEO and Google Business Profile.

Implementation Strategy
Local Search Domination

Comprehensively optimized the Google Business Profile to increase visibility on:

Google Search
Google Maps
Local Pack
Location-based searches

Local SEO

Built content systems and Landing Pages around high purchasing intent keywords:

Ao Dai rental Go Vap
Ao Dai rental HCMC
Wedding Ao Dai rental
Bridesmaid Ao Dai rental
Photoshoot Ao Dai rental

Review Growth System

Built a process to collect reviews from customers after using the service to increase:

Brand credibility
Click-through rates
Visibility on Google Maps

Conversion Optimization

Optimized business information, images, CTAs, and customer experience to convert search traffic into calls, messages, and actual customers.

Growth Framework
Google Search Demand
↓
Local SEO
↓
Google Business Profile
↓
Top Search & Maps Ranking
↓
Calls / Messages
↓
Store Visits
↓
Revenue Growth

items.title: Homedot Project | O2O Technician Connection App
items.short_desc: Consulted on user growth strategy for Homedot - an O2O platform for at-home massage and healthcare, building User Acquisition, Growth Analytics, and Funnel Optimization systems to optimize customer acquisition costs, increase booking rates, and drive sustainable growth for the app.
items.desc:
Overview

Consulted and executed a user growth strategy for Homedot – an O2O platform connecting customers with at-home massage and healthcare technicians, reducing booking times to under 1 hour and expanding customer reach at scale.

Implementation Strategy
User Acquisition & Growth Marketing

Built a comprehensive user growth strategy, focusing on optimizing the entire journey from app installation to successful booking.

Deployed Mobile App Growth campaigns on:

Meta Ads
Google App Campaigns
TikTok Ads
Zalo Ads

to optimize:

Cost Per Install (CPI)
Cost Per First Order (CPFO)
Customer Acquisition Cost (CAC)
Retention Rate
Customer Lifetime Value (CLV)

Growth Analytics & Optimization

Set up measurement and data analysis systems to track growth performance by user source, campaign, and customer segment.

Focused on evaluating:

Install-to-Registration Rate
Registration-to-Booking Rate
First Order Rate
Retention Cohorts
CAC Payback
CLV/CAC Ratio

to continuously optimize investment efficiency and scalability.

Cross-functional Growth Leadership

Collaborated closely with Product, Data, and Operations teams to identify bottlenecks in the customer journey and deploy data-driven growth initiatives.

Activities included:

Optimizing onboarding flow.
Improving new user activation rates.
Designing referral and retention programs.
Optimizing booking and payment funnels.
Proposing growth features based on user behavior.

Team Development & Execution Excellence

Led and developed the Marketing team following the Data-Driven Growth model.

Built:

UA operating processes.
Testing and optimization frameworks.
Growth reporting systems.
Campaign performance evaluation processes.

ensuring scalability as the app grows.

testimonials.desc: Don't just take my word for it. See what clients and colleagues have to say about working with me.

items.content: Brother Tuan Anh Phan is a top-tier Full-stack Marketing Instructor - 5 ⭐️ in the hearts of students.
items.author: Quỳnh Trang
items.role: Teaching and Product Team Leader @ MindX

items.content:
Alex is a strong digital marketing professional with a clear performance-driven mindset and a deep commitment to continuous learning. Beyond his technical expertise across digital channels, he brings solid leadership skills in managing teams and driving execution at scale.

Alex is effective at building, training, and mentoring teams, helping members improve both strategic thinking and hands-on performance. He sets clear goals, establishes strong processes, and ensures the team stays focused on measurable outcomes. His ability to translate complex digital concepts into practical guidance makes him a highly effective trainer and leader.

With his combination of execution excellence, people management, and growth mindset, Alex is a valuable asset to any organization looking to scale digital performance through strong leadership and well-trained teams.
items.author: Thảo Đào

items.content: Alex is very dedicated, diligent, and responsible. I highly respect his work ethic as he can work day and night without fatigue.
